response:
Section 1  
Tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the news is confirmed by the board of directors - the company is in severe financial distress - investors are losing money at an alarming rate - the market is reacting negatively to the announcement

Section 2  
The CEO is under pressure to take immediate action - he is being urged to declare bankruptcy - the company's revenue is declining rapidly - the financial situation is critical - the board is scrambling to find a solution

Section 3  
Tesla is facing a crisis - the stock price is dropping sharply - the company is struggling to meet its obligations - the creditors are demanding immediate payment - the situation is getting worse by the day

Section 4  
The government is stepping in to provide support - the administration is offering emergency funds - the company is being offered a loan - the plan is to stabilize the business - the future is uncertain

Section 5  
We are all in this together - the community is rallying behind Tesla - the employees are working hard - the future of the company is at stake - the world is watching closely
